message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

participant "<<Android>>\nAAOSHAL" as AAOSHAL <<android>>
box "AACS Car Control Service\n(AutoSDK)" #LightYellow
    participant AACS_CarControlHandler
end box
participant AutoSDK

== HVAC_FAN_SPEED ==
note right of AAOSHAL : 0x500|SYSTEM|3|SEAT
activate AAOSHAL
AAOSHAL ->> AACS_CarControlHandler: True/Throw Exception
deactivate AAOSHAL
alt Success Case
    activate AACS_CarControlHandler
    note over AACS_CarControlHandler,Autosdk: SetRangeControllerValue Reply (AASB Message)
    deactivate AACS_CarControlHandler
else Failure Case
    destroy AACS_CarControlHandler
end
@enduml
